title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 58.205 - Sheriff or chief deputy to perform coroner's duties, when
text:
58.205.  Sheriff or chief deputy to perform coroner's duties, when. — The sheriff of the proper county or his chief deputy shall, in the temporary absence of the coroner and deputy for any reason, perform all the duties imposed by law upon the coroner.
(L. 1951 p. 374 § 58.005, A.L. 1986 H.B. 1164)
